company_tagline: The Work AI platform connected to all your company data. Find, create, and automate anything.
bridge_signals: Glean hired 3 people from Boston University.

narrative_sections.heading: Company Focus Areas
bullets: Enhancing AI Assistant Capabilities: Glean is focused on upgrading its AI assistant to be more proactive, customizable, and capable of executing tasks across various enterprise tools.

Integrating AI Deeply into Enterprise Operations: Glean aims to transition from a simple search tool to a comprehensive AI framework that integrates large language models with enterprise data to enhance decision-making processes.

narrative_sections.heading: Hiring And Headcount
paragraphs: Significant growth in sales: The Sales department has seen a 42% increase in headcount over the past year.
Expansion in engineering: The Engineering department has grown by 31% over the past year.

narrative_sections.heading: Competitors Summary
paragraphs: Glean Technologies operates in a highly competitive AI platform market, focusing on enterprise search and knowledge management.
The company faces significant competition from established players like Kore.ai, Copilot Studio, and Microsoft Fabric.
